item.name: Ingest time-series data for multiple assets/aspects

request.name: Ingest time-series data for multiple assets/aspects

description.content: Creates or updates time-series data for multiple asset-aspect combinations in a single request. Each entry specifies an assetId, aspectName, and array of timestamped data points.

item.name: Ingest time-series data for a single asset aspect

request.name: Ingest time-series data for a single asset aspect

description.content: Creates or updates time-series data for a specific asset and aspect. Each data point must include a _time field (ISO 8601 UTC) and values for aspect variables.

item.name: Query time-series data for an asset aspect

request.name: Query time-series data for an asset aspect

description.content: Retrieves time-series data for a specific asset and aspect within a time range. Supports time range queries, field selection, and result limiting. Data is returned ordered by timestamp ascending.

query.description: Maximum number of data points to return (max 2000)
Comma-separated list of variable names to include
Return only the most recent data point

item.name: Delete time-series data for an asset aspect

request.name: Delete time-series data for an asset aspect

description.content: Deletes all time-series data within an hourly-aligned time range for a specific asset and aspect. The time range must align to UTC hour boundaries.

info.name: Siemens MindSphere IoT Time Series API

description.content:
The MindSphere IoT Time Series API enables storing, querying, and retrieving time-series telemetry data from industrial equipment and IoT assets. Supports high-frequency data ingestion (up to 1 Hz), bulk imports, and time-range queries for sensor and machine data organized by asset and aspect.

Contact Support:
 Name: Siemens MindSphere Developer Support
